deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'n=1; until npx prisma migrate deploy; do if [ $n -ge 6 ]; then echo "FATAL: prisma migrate deploy gagal setelah 6 percobaan — cek DATABASE_URL & service Postgres"; exit 1; fi; echo "DB belum terjangkau (private network Railway butuh beberapa detik) — percobaan $n/6, ulang dalam 5s"; n=$((n+1)); sleep 5; done; exec npm run start'
